name: hemp-homes-drive-sync
description: Google Drive folder sync into the hemp-homes-media Supabase Storage bucket.

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
env_vars.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for Google Drive readonly scope. Reused from the preflight project's Corporate AI Solutions client.
env_vars.where: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
env_vars.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret companion to GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.
env_vars.where: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials (signing secret shown once)

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CANONICAL_URL
env_vars.description: Used to construct the OAuth redirect URI: <CANONICAL>/api/admin/hemp-homes/drive/callback

external_setup.title: Google Cloud OAuth consent screen
external_setup.description: App must be in Testing mode with operator's gmail as a Test user, OR verified for the drive.readonly restricted scope.
steps: Confirm publishing status is Testing (recommended for personal admin tools)
Confirm operator email is in the Test Users list
Confirm 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly' is in the Scopes list (DO NOT submit for verification — Testing mode bypasses)

external_setup.title: Google OAuth client redirect URIs
external_setup.description: Authorized redirect URIs must include the f2k callback path.
steps: Open the OAuth 2.0 client (Corporate AI Solutions for the f2k portfolio)
Save — propagation takes up to a few hours

external_setup.title: Supabase Storage project upload cap
external_setup.description: Project-level Max upload size must exceed the largest video being synced. Bumped to 5GB on 2026-05-22.
steps: Default is 50MB on free tier; bump on Pro tier to 5GB (max)

external_setup.title: Drive folder accessible to authorising account
external_setup.description: The folder ID 1I3rbikNGgVtUXNwpvfU5ud67aTE3pfyQ must be accessible by the Google account that authorises the connection.
steps: Open the folder in the same Google account used to Connect Drive
Confirm 'My Drive' or 'Shared with me' access
